description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a dark metallic receiver and barrel, complemented by polished wooden furniture on the stock and foregrip. The stock is robust and fixed, crafted from a rich, reddish-brown wood, providing a traditional and sturdy appearance. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, ending with a simple muzzle, and the receiver is boxy with visible mechanical details. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the grip is integrated into the wooden stock. There are basic iron sights mounted on the top of the receiver and barrel, suitable for standard aiming. The overall construction suggests a historical or vintage submachine gun, likely modeled after the Thompson or similar firearms.
description: A vintage-style rifle with a dark metal body and polished wooden stock and foregrip, featuring iron sights and a short barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, foregrip, and the entire length of the barrel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width and taper of the wooden stock, with the barrel and receiver aligned in a straight line.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the wooden stock, grip, and barrel.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular end of the barrel and the narrow profile of the rifle, with the stock extending behind.
